title: Vignea angustior
taxonomy: Vignea angustior is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant is a climber, and its classification is within the genus Vigna. The species Vigna angustior is further classified as a member of the subgenus Psophocarpus.
